title: Interactive Demo Quiz
description: A sample quiz to demonstrate ThinkFast features.

questions.question: What is the capital of France?
questions.subject: General
questions.description: Paris is the capital and most populous city of France.

questions.question: Which of these are Flutter widgets?
questions.subject: Tech
questions.description: Container and Row are core layout widgets in Flutter. View is used in Android, and Div is used in HTML.
